abs2022mapping.title: Mapping Evidence in Rapid Reviews
abs2022mapping.abstract: We present a rapid review mapping technique. The method improves traceability but is limited by sparse metadata in older sources.

abs2021claims.title: Claim Structuring for Scientific Narratives
abs2021claims.abstract: This paper proposes claim templates for literature synthesis. Results indicate better alignment between claims and evidence, although external validity is limited.
